About

Exploring how design can connect people, emotions, and everyday life.

3.9
GPA at UMN

I'm a graphic designer based in Shakopee, Minnesota, currently pursuing a BFA in Graphic Design at the University of Minnesota Twin Cities.

My work sits between brand thinking and hands-on production: identity systems, packaging, typography, editorial layout, and content made for real channels, not just presentation boards.

With freelance experience and an active creative production role at Giften Market, I’m comfortable carrying a project from first direction to final file. Bilingual in English and Vietnamese, and open to internship, part-time, or full-time design and marketing roles.
